from_2021.text: Andy Jassy became Amazon CEO in July 2021, succeeding Jeff Bezos who founded the company in 1994.

from_2024.text: Andy Jassy continues as Amazon CEO in early 2024, maintaining the leadership role he assumed in 2021.

challenge: Same person (Andy Jassy) across years, embeddings nearly identical

query: Who was the CEO of Netflix in 2020?

from_2020.text: Ted Sarandos became co-CEO of Netflix in July 2020, sharing the role with Reed Hastings.

from_2023.text: Ted Sarandos continues as Netflix co-CEO in 2023, following his appointment in 2020.

challenge: Same person (Ted Sarandos) across years, minimal semantic difference

from_2001.text: Eric Schmidt became Google CEO in March 2001, bringing executive experience to the young company founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin.

from_1998.text: Larry Page co-founded Google in 1998 and served as CEO during the company's early startup phase.

challenge: 3-year gap, both during early Google era with founder context

query: Who was the President of France in 2007?

from_2007.text: Nicolas Sarkozy became President of France in May 2007, succeeding Jacques Chirac.

from_2012.text: François Hollande became President of France in May 2012, succeeding Nicolas Sarkozy.

challenge: 5-year gap, different people but similar political context

query: Who was the CEO of Twitter or X in 2008?

from_2008.text: Evan Williams became Twitter CEO in October 2008, taking over from co-founder Jack Dorsey.

from_2006.text: Jack Dorsey co-founded Twitter in 2006 and served as the company's first CEO.

challenge: 2-year gap, both founders of Twitter, strong semantic similarity

query: Who was the CEO of Twitter or X in 2010?

from_2010.text: Dick Costolo became Twitter CEO in October 2010, succeeding Evan Williams.

from_2006.text: Jack Dorsey co-founded Twitter in 2006 and served as the company's first CEO during its early growth.

challenge: 4-year gap, founder era has stronger semantic similarity

query: Who was the CEO of Apple before Tim Cook?

succession_correct.text: Steve Jobs served as Apple CEO from 1997 to 2011, when Tim Cook succeeded him.

wrong_predecessor.text: John Sculley was Apple CEO from 1983 to 1993, well before Tim Cook's appointment in 2011.

challenge: Directional operator 'before' requires graph succession chain

query: Who leads the company since Tim Cook's departure?

factual_current.text: Tim Cook continues to lead Apple as CEO in 2024, a role he has held since 2011.

counterfactual.text: After Tim Cook's departure in 2023, Jeff Williams became Apple's new CEO.

challenge: Query assumes departure that hasn't happened, graph can detect this
